note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 4.3 cm x 4.8 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 68% slough, 32% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Left buttock — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Foam dressing change daily.

Wound note - Leftbuttock. Meas 4.3x4.8x1.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 70% gran, 30% slough. Periwound erythematous. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Bergstrom notified.
